prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Private Integration Token (PIT)
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY=<your PIT> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then run: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY "$GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY". Get the PIT from GHL Settings > Integrations > Private Integrations.

prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Location ID
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID=<your location id> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env, then: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID "$GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID".
